title: moraea pavonia var. villosa
intro: Moraea pavonia var. villosa, also known as the woolly-flowered sabi sabi or sabi sabi, is a variety of the Moraea pavonia plant, belonging to the Iridaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Moraea pavonia var. villosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate joint pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, or used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
